inline_comments.message:
Would getOrchestrationRequestsByFilter("modelType", "vfmodule") also work ?
I think it would be easier to understand for other developers if it's consistent with modelType filtering

I've found out modelType is represented as requestScope in orchestration request, when using 'action':'scaleOut' it allows me to filter out other modelTypes as 'createInstance'.
Should also all requests with modelType: vfModule (including scaleOut, createInstance and others) be visible on VNF Changes dashboard?
